description_long: This delivery robot features a cylindrical body with a weathered orange and green color scheme, accented by metallic and mechanical details. The front displays three circular elements vertically aligned, possibly sensors or lights, beneath a large white number '4' and some stenciled text. Four articulated legs with claw-like feet extend from the base, providing stability and mobility, each leg covered with orange armor plating. The rear is equipped with a complex assembly of pipes, tanks, and two vertical antennae, suggesting advanced communication or environmental sensing capabilities. The sides reveal additional mechanical components and tubing, with the left side dominated by a large cylindrical canister and ribbed piping. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for navigating urban environments and delivering cargo securely.
description: A rugged, cylindrical delivery robot with orange and green panels, four articulated legs, and prominent front sensors, designed for urban navigation and cargo transport.
description_view_0: Front view shows the three circular sensors or lights, the number '4', and the main access area, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Left-rear angle highlights the large cylindrical canister, ribbed piping, and rear-mounted antennae, with mechanical details more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual antennae, two rectangular access panels, and symmetrical mechanical components, with no visible sensors.
description_view_3: Right-rear angle reveals the side piping, canister, and partial view of the front sensors, with the number '4' partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: On the front upper section, there is a large white number '4' and some stenciled text, but no recognizable brand logo.
attribute_sensor_array: Three circular sensors or lights vertically aligned on the front center panel, likely for navigation or environmental detection.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: Two rectangular access panels are visible on the rear, each with a recessed area and possible hinge lines, suggesting access to internal compartments.
